article.description: — Paolo Banchero had 23 points, nine rebounds and four assists to lead the eighth-seeded Orlando Magic to a 112-101 win over the top-seeded Detroit...
article.headline: Paolo Banchero scores 23 and Magic beat Pistons 112-101 to extend NBA's longest home postseason skid

images.caption: Wendell Carter Jr. takes advantage of Duncan Robinson's position under the rim and rises for a dunk.
images.name: Wendell Carter Jr. throws down a massive jam

article.linkText: Paolo Banchero scores 23 and Magic beat Pistons 112-101 to extend NBA's longest home postseason skid
article.story: DETROIT -- — Paolo Banchero had 23 points, nine rebounds and four assists to lead the eighth-seeded Orlando Magic to a 112-101 win over the top-seeded Detroit Pistons on Sunday night in Game 1 of their first-round series, extending the longest home playoff losing streak in NBA history. Detroit has dropped 11 straight home games in the postseason, a drought that dates to 2008. The Pistons will get another chance against Orlando on Wednesday night in Game 2. Detroit's Cade Cunningham scored a playoff career-high 39 points and Tobias Harris added 17 for the Pistons, but the rest of their teammates were quiet offensively. Franz Wagner scored 11 of his 19 points in the fourth quarter to help seal the victory for the Magic, who never trailed. Orlando’s Desmond Bane and Wendell Carter scored 17 points each and Jalen Suggs had 16. The Pistons haven’t advanced beyond the first round in the postseason in 18 years and the Magic haven’t since 2010. Orlando looked ready and Detroit looked rusty early. The Magic, coming off a rout of Charlotte in a play-in game on Friday, led 18-5 midway through the first quarter after holding the Pistons to 1-of-6 shooting with four turnovers in their first game in a week. Detroit rallied to pull within two before Orlando closed with six straight points to lead 35-27 after Banchero and Suggs combined to score 20 points. The Magic led 55-51 at halftime. The Pistons came out flat in the second half and Orlando took advantage, scoring eight of the first nine points and prompting Detroit coach J.B. Bickerstaff to call a timeout. Detroit scored 10 straight points and 13 of 15 to pull into a 65-all tie on Cunningham’s 3-pointer. Banchero answered with a long jumper over Jalen Duren and Bane followed with a 3-pointer over Cunningham, leading to the Magic restoring a double-digit lead. Orlando led 81-74 going into the fourth quarter. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

videos.description: Jalen Suggs keeps the play alive and pushes it to Franz Wagner for a tough bucket.
videos.headline: Jalen Suggs' hustle leads to a Magic and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Suggs' hustle leads to a Magic and-1) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Cade Cunningham passes the ball down the court to Ausar Thompson for a dunk.
videos.headline: Cade Cunningham throws pinpoint pass for a Pistons dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cade Cunningham throws pinpoint pass for a Pistons dunk) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Isaiah Stewart denies Paolo Banchero, which leads to a transition basket for the Pistons.
videos.headline: Isaiah Stewart makes an emphatic rejection at the rim

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Isaiah Stewart makes an emphatic rejection at the rim) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Suggs steals the ball from Cade Cunningham and dunks it for the Magic.
videos.headline: Jalen Suggs picks Cade Cunningham's pocket and throws down transition jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Suggs picks Cade Cunningham's pocket and throws down transition jam) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Duren prevents Desmond Bane from scoring in the nick of time.
videos.headline: Jalen Duren makes an impressive block with his fingertips

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Duren makes an impressive block with his fingertips) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Ron Holland II runs the floor to dunk a transition basket for the Pistons.
videos.headline: Ron Holland II cuts to the rim for a slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Ron Holland II cuts to the rim for a slam) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Tobias Harris flies through the lane for a two-handed Pistons jam.
videos.headline: Tobias Harris finishes with great burst to the rim

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tobias Harris finishes with great burst to the rim) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Duren snatches an offensive rebound and hammers a one-handed dunk for Detroit.
videos.headline: Jalen Duren throws down a slam with authority

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Duren throws down a slam with authority) 2026/04/19 ESHEET

videos.description: Paolo Banchero hits Wendell Carter Jr. for an alley-oop jam.
